page_metadata.bioconda__summary: A fast and accurate adapter trimmer for paired-end reads.
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: A fast and accurate adapter trimmer for paired-end reads.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Skewer implements a novel dynamic programming algorithm dedicated to the task of adapter trimming and it is specially designed for processing illumina paired-end sequences.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Skewer implements a novel dynamic programming algorithm dedicated to the task of adapter trimming and it is specially designed for processing illumina paired-end sequences.
